examples: My work is not recognized by anybody!
The best student was recognized by the Dean
The Regents officially recognized the new educational institution
The fleeing convicts were picked out of the darkness by the watchful prison guards
I can't make out the faces in this photograph

meanings.definition: express obligation, thanks, or gratitude for
examples: We must acknowledge the kindness she showed towards us

meanings.definition: be fully aware or cognizant of
accept (someone) to be what is claimed or accept his power and authority
examples: The Crown Prince was acknowledged as the true heir to the throne
We do not recognize your gods
several accepted techniques for treating the condition
his recognized superiority in this kind of work
